title: Aegon’s Conquest: The Three Dragons #got #shorts
description: Aegon did not conquer Westeros alone—he brought three dragons, each capable of destroying kingdoms. This is the power that changed history forever. #ASOIAF #Dragons #Shorts

scenes.narration: Aegon did not come alone—he brought three dragons that no army could stand against.
scenes.image_prompt: three massive dragons emerging from clouds over Westeros, epic cinematic scale, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The first was Balerion, the Black Dread—the largest and most terrifying dragon ever seen.
scenes.image_prompt: giant black dragon casting shadow over entire city, overwhelming presence, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: His fire could melt stone, and his wings could darken the sky itself.
scenes.image_prompt: Balerion breathing massive fire across fortress, sky darkened by wings, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The second was Vhagar, fierce and relentless, a dragon of war and destruction.
scenes.image_prompt: Vhagar diving through battlefield with aggressive intensity, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: And the third was Meraxes, swift and deadly, striking from above before enemies could react.
scenes.image_prompt: Meraxes soaring high and striking quickly from sky, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Together, they formed a force unlike anything Westeros had ever faced.
scenes.image_prompt: three dragons circling above battlefield in synchronized motion, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: No castle was strong enough, no army large enough, and no king prepared for what was coming.
scenes.image_prompt: massive armies looking up in fear at dragons overhead, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: This was not a war of strategy—it was a war of overwhelming power.
scenes.image_prompt: battlefield engulfed in dragonfire with chaos below, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: And once the dragons took flight, the fate of Westeros was already decided.
scenes.image_prompt: dragons flying over map of Westeros as kingdoms fall one by one, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because this was never a fair fight—it was the beginning of a new world.
scenes.image_prompt: three dragons silhouetted against burning horizon, cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
